text: Being here feels strange—I am surrounded by spaces designed for innovation and reflection. The empty conference room behind glass seems to await collective thought and debate, while the R+D wall outside declares human curiosity and invention. The light and modernity encourage me, but the lack of people gives a quiet, almost anticipatory loneliness. I find myself wondering what discoveries begin in such places—and who I am, gazing in from the edge of this silent anticipation.
